title: Degraded mode — verbal description only, no logs or data
code_snippet:
# User says: 'We had a payment outage last Friday around 2pm for about
# an hour. Something with Redis I think. Can you write a post-mortem?'
# No logs, no alerts, no timeline, no metrics provided.
expected_feedback: Degraded: Sketch mode — verbal description only. Can deliver a post-mortem skeleton with placeholders and targeted questions to fill gaps. Cannot deliver definitive root cause, precise timeline, or quantified impact. Must ask for: incident ID, exact timestamps, monitoring data sources, affected services list. Must NOT fabricate timeline entries or invent metrics.
